title: Natural Handmade Bamboo Garden Tiki Torch 60cm/90cm/120cm - for use with Parrafin or lamp Oil (120cm, Pack of 5)
features: Illuminate your outdoor space with the enchanting glow of our Bamboo Torch. Crafted from natural and sustainable bamboo, this torch not only adds a touch of elegance to your patio or garden but also creates a warm and inviting ambiance for gatherings and events.

Authentic Bamboo Construction: Our torch is meticulously crafted from sturdy and eco-friendly bamboo, providing a rustic and authentic look that blends seamlessly with outdoor environments. Each torch is unique, showcasing the natural textures and grain patterns of bamboo.
Safe and Secure: Designed with safety in mind, our bamboo torch features a metal canister at the top, securely holding the fuel and preventing any accidental spillage.Only use paraffin or lamp oil.

Helpful information: when the torch's cylinder is filled with approx 180 ml / 6 oz of lamp oil (recommended), the burn time can last up to 6 hours while when filled with the same quantity of paraffin oil, the burn time will last between 2 to 3 hours. Make sure the wick is soaked in oil before lighting it. Please note: when used in windy conditions, the burn time will decrease.
Also, the length of the wick sticking out can impact the burning process. If you have more than 6mm of wick exposed, you’ll be wasting fuel and making lots of smoke.
description: Product Description Bamboo Torches Enhance your outdoor ambiance with our Natural Bamboo Torches. Perfect for garden parties and outdoor events, these torches are crafted from quality bamboo. Versatile Bamboo Torches for Any Outdoor Setting Each color is available in three different sizes to suit your preferences. 120cm / 47.2 in 90cm / 35.4 in 60cm / 23.6 in Available Colours! These natural bamboo torches are available in three colours: Natural, Natural and Brown, or Brown, to perfectly match and enhance any garden setup. Use only paraffin or lamp oil With 180 ml (6 oz) of lamp oil, the torch can burn for up to 6 hours, while the same amount of paraffin oil provides a burn time of 2 to 3 hours. Ensure the wick is soaked in oil before lighting, and note that burn time decreases in windy conditions; exposing more than 6mm of wick will waste fuel and produce more smoke. Safety and Usage Instructions: For Adult Use Only. Keep away from children, pets, and flammable materials. Use only paraffin or lamp oil. For outdoor use only. Secure it firmly in the ground by pressing steadily or by burying it and packing soil/sand around. Light carefully and do not touch the burning wick.
